where_to_post: Your owned blog / long-form site (compounding SEO)
what_to_post: Search-intent how-to guides targeting buyer keywords
Original data and bold predictions journalists cite
when_to_post: Increase cadence to 3-5x/week; post weekday mornings (Tue-Thu) when reach peaks.
collaborators: Adjacent creators with larger but overlapping audiences
Industry publishers open to co-authored content
podcasts_to_appear_on: Mid-tier niche shows in your category (high conversion, easy yes)
conferences_to_speak_at: Regional meetups and community events (low barrier to a first talk)
Vertical conferences where your buyers gather
awards_to_apply_for: Industry 'best of' and innovation awards for press coverage
Category-specific excellence awards aligned to your strengths
